title: The equivariant K- and KO-theory of certain classifying spaces via an equivariant Atiyah–Hirzebruch spectral sequence
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: In this paper, we compute the [Formula: see text]- and [Formula: see text]-theory for the classifying [Formula: see text]-spaces [Formula: see text] for proper actions of certain infinite discrete groups [Formula: see text] via the equivariant Atiyah–Hirzebruch spectral sequence.
